title: Review Request
description: Payload sent to Richmond (reviewer agent) asking for a code review

taskId.description: Task identifier whose output is being reviewed

commitHash.description: Commit SHA containing the changes to review

filesChanged.description: Relative paths of files included in the review

summary.description: Human-readable description of what was changed and why

questions.description: Specific questions the implementing agent wants the reviewer to address

riskLevel.description: Agent's self-assessed risk level for these changes
